security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.
The system does not employ any mechanism to prevent vote replay attacks

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be modified without proper validation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not adequately validate vote data.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate the integrity of vote data.
The actor has the ability to intercept and modify vote messages before they reach the contract.
The system lacks mechanisms to detect or prevent tampering with vote data

mitigation.strategy: Implement data integrity checks and validation of the vote data before processing.

description: An attacker may intercept and modify votes before they are recorded in the contract.

security_gap.gap_description: The system lacks mechanisms to ensure accountability for votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not provide adequate mechanisms for tracking and verifying vote origins and identities.

assumptions: The system does not implement robust logging or auditing mechanisms to track votes.
The system does not enforce strong user authentication.
The system does not provide a way to link votes to specific user identities definitively

mitigation.strategy: Implement detailed logging and auditing of all votes cast, including user identities and timestamps. Use cryptographic techniques to ensure vote immutability and traceability.

description: An attacker can cast votes and deny their participation.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be exposed to unauthorized actors.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks sufficient access control mechanisms to protect vote data.

assumptions: Vote data is stored in the contract's state and potentially accessible to unauthorized users through contract interactions.
The system does not employ encryption or other confidentiality-preserving mechanisms to protect vote data.
The system does not restrict access to vote data through appropriate role-based access control measures

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt or obfuscate vote data during storage or transmission. Implement role-based access control mechanisms that ensure only authorized users can access vote data.

description: Vote data may be exposed to unauthorized parties via contract interactions.
